title: Red Dead Redemption 2

notes:
Tried everything, changed resolution, graphics and i get only "CRASH ERR_GFX_D3D_DEFERRED_MEM"
for older GPU, forget about this game because it's Borked and Rockstar doesn't care about you, the only way to play this game is on Windows using DX12 because the Linux version crashes when trying to use DX12 but Vulkan gives this Memory Leak Crash every single time.
i got lucky to get the game running ONE time and nothing else, again the only way to play this game using a old Graphic card is on Windows don't even bother with Linux on this one or get a better Card with enough VRAM.

the VRAM leak problem was a thing since launch and Rockstar don't even bother trying to fix this broken game.
